preconditions: Service is running and listening on :8080
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: resp = httpGet(':8080/ping'); assert resp.status == 200; assert json(resp.body) == {"message":"pong"}; assert resp.headers['Content-Type'] contains 'application/json'

preconditions: Service is running and listening on :8080
Service is running and listening on :8080
Service is running
Logger middleware is active
Log output is captured
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: capturedLogs = captureStdout(); httpGet(':8080/ping'); assert capturedLogs contains 'GET'; assert capturedLogs contains '/ping'; assert capturedLogs contains '200'

preconditions: Service is running with Recovery middleware active
A test route /panic-test is registered that calls panic('test panic')
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: resp = httpGet(':8080/panic-test'); assert resp.status == 500; resp2 = httpGet(':8080/ping'); assert resp2.status == 200

preconditions: Service is running and listening on :8080
Repository root is the working directory
Go toolchain 1.25+ is installed
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: result = exec('go build ./...'); assert result.exit_code == 0; assert result.stderr == ''

preconditions: go.mod is present at the repository root
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: content = readFile('go.mod'); assert content contains 'module github.com/agent-fox-dev/srv-skafolding'; assert goVersionAtLeast(content, '1.25')

preconditions: Repository has been cloned or checked out
Repository source is available
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: pkgs = goListPackages('cmd/...'); for pkg in pkgs: assert pkg.packageName == 'main'

preconditions: Port :8080 is free
Service binary has been built
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: proc = startService(); sleep(500ms); resp = httpGet(':8080/ping'); assert resp.status == 200; proc.stop()

preconditions: Repository source is available
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: src = readFile('cmd/server/main.go'); assert 'os.Getenv' not in src; assert 'flag.Parse' not in src; assert 'os.Open' not in src

preconditions: Repository source is available
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: src = readFile('cmd/server/main.go'); posLogger = src.indexOf('middleware.Logger'); posRecover = src.indexOf('middleware.Recover'); posCORS = src.indexOf('middleware.CORS'); assert posLogger < posRecover; assert posRecover < posCORS

preconditions: Repository source is available
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: handlerSrc = readFile('internal/handler/handler.go'); assert handlerSrc defines a ping handler function; mainSrc = readFile('cmd/server/main.go'); assert mainSrc registers GET /ping route

preconditions: Repository source is available
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: handlerSrc = readFile('internal/handler/handler.go'); assert handlerSrc defines a healthz handler function; mainSrc = readFile('cmd/server/main.go'); assert mainSrc registers GET /healthz route

preconditions: Repository source is available
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: handlerSrc = readFile('internal/handler/handler.go'); assert handlerSrc defines a readyz handler function; mainSrc = readFile('cmd/server/main.go'); assert mainSrc registers GET /readyz route

property_tests.for_any_strategy: Any valid HTTP GET request to /ping (varying headers, query params, user-agents)
property_tests.invariant_check: assert response.status == 200 AND json(response.body) == {"message":"pong"} AND response.headers['Content-Type'] contains 'application/json'

property_tests.for_any_strategy: Any valid HTTP GET request to /healthz or /readyz (varying headers, timing during server lifetime)
Any HTTP request to any registered route (/ping, /healthz, /readyz)
property_tests.invariant_check: assert Logger middleware emitted a log line AND CORS headers present in response AND (if panic occurred: Recovery returned 500)

property_tests.for_any_strategy: Any handler that calls panic() with any value (string, error, nil, integer)
property_tests.invariant_check: assert response.status == 500 AND server process is still alive (subsequent GET /ping returns 200)

property_tests.for_any_strategy: Any state of the repository after any code change (property: build must not regress)
Any external Go module path attempting to import any package under internal/
property_tests.invariant_check: assert go build of external module exits non-zero with 'use of internal package' error

preconditions: Service is running and listening on :8080
Service is running and listening on :8080
Service is running and listening on :8080
Service is running and listening on :8080
Service is running and listening on :8080
Service is running with Recovery middleware active
A test route /panic-test is registered that calls panic('simulated failure')
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode: resp1 = httpGet(':8080/panic-test'); assert resp1.status == 500; resp2 = httpGet(':8080/ping'); assert resp2.status == 200

preconditions: Service is running
Log output is captured
A test route /panic-test panics
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode: capturedLogs = captureStdout(); httpGet(':8080/panic-test'); assert capturedLogs contains '500'

preconditions: Port :8080 is already bound by another process
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode: bindPort(':8080'); result = startService(); waitForExit(result); assert result.exit_code != 0; assert result.stderr or result.stdout contains error message about :8080

preconditions: go.mod is present
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode: deps = goListModDependencies('go.mod'); nonEchoDeps = [d for d in deps if not isEchoOrTransitive(d)]; assert len(nonEchoDeps) == 0

preconditions: Repository source is available
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode: src = readFile('cmd/server/main.go'); forbiddenMiddleware = ['RateLimiter','Helmet','JWT','BasicAuth','KeyAuth','BodyLimit']; for m in forbiddenMiddleware: assert m not in src

preconditions: An external test module exists that attempts to import github.com/agent-fox-dev/srv-skafolding/internal/handler
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode: result = exec('go build <external-module-importing-internal>'); assert result.exit_code != 0; assert 'use of internal package' in result.stderr

preconditions: Service is running and listening on :8080

smoke_tests.trigger: Send GET /ping to the running service on :8080
expected_effects: Logger middleware emits a log line containing GET, /ping, and 200

smoke_tests.trigger: Send GET /healthz to the running service on :8080
expected_effects: Logger middleware emits a log line containing GET, /healthz, and 200

smoke_tests.trigger: Send GET /readyz to the running service on :8080
expected_effects: Logger middleware emits a log line containing GET, /readyz, and 200

smoke_tests.trigger: Send a request to a handler that deliberately calls panic()
mockable: panicking handler stub registered on a test route
expected_effects: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error returned to the client
Server process continues running and accepts subsequent requests
Logger middleware emits a log entry with status 500

smoke_tests.trigger: Run `go build ./...` from the repository root

gaps: EH-004 (404 for unregistered paths) — not explicitly covered by a dedicated test case; Echo's default behaviour is implicitly trusted but could be added as ECT-013 if desired.
Concurrent panic recovery (multiple simultaneous panicking requests) — not modelled; could be added as a load/stress property test.
Logger output format validation beyond the presence of method/path/status fields — format is implementation-defined by Echo and not fully specified in the PRD.
